title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG The Nerv White Paper and quot
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG The Nerv White Paper and quot
wikitext:
[]: "Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper&quot             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Jan 06, 2015 11:28 pm So I was looking around Ebay for a copy of the Evangelion RPG, because I'm working on a fanfic that could really use some of the information on the characters and scenarios in the sourcebook but my friend (who knows Japanese) can't read the scans on the RPG's wiki page , when I was suddenly struck by a thought. "Instead of going out and spending money you need for other things getting a copy of the sourcebook why don't you just ask to see if anyone else has some high-quality scans already or if they can whip up some?" So I came to the place to go for English Evangelion information and decided to ask. Does anyone have any high-quality scans of the Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper ?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jan 07, 2015 9:31 am You can click on the images in the wiki to have them in higher definition.

Article: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG The Nerv White Paper and quot
[]: "Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper&quot             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Jan 06, 2015 11:28 pm So I was looking around Ebay for a copy of the Evangelion RPG, because I'm working on a fanfic that could really use some of the information on the characters and scenarios in the sourcebook but my friend (who knows Japanese) can't read the scans on the RPG's wiki page , when I was suddenly struck by a thought. "Instead of going out and spending money you need for other things getting a copy of the sourcebook why don't you just ask to see if anyone else has some high-quality scans already or if they can whip up some?" So I came to the place to go for English Evangelion information and decided to ask. Does anyone have any high-quality scans of the Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper ?
